ayahEnglish: By the star when it descends,

targetTranslation: he descended/fell (in إِذَا هَوَىٰ - when it falls)
ayahEnglish: By the star when it descends,

targetTranslation: he went astray (negated by ما before it)
ayahEnglish: Your companion [i.e., Muḥammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,
Your companion [i.e., Muḥammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,

targetTranslation: he strayed (past tense, connected to ما meaning 'not')
ayahEnglish: Your companion [i.e., Muḥammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,
Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.

targetTranslation: it (referring to what was mentioned before)
ayahEnglish: It is not but a revelation revealed,

targetTranslation: a revelation (subject of يُوحَىٰ - is revealed)
ayahEnglish: It is not but a revelation revealed,
distractors: and he will come to Us

targetTranslation: it is being revealed (object of إِلَّا)
ayahEnglish: It is not but a revelation revealed,
Taught to him by one intense in strength [i.e., Gabriel] -
Taught to him by one intense in strength [i.e., Gabriel] -
One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
Then he approached and descended
And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.
And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.
And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.

targetTranslation: His servant (possessed by Allah, following إلى)
ayahEnglish: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed [i.e., conveyed].
And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed [i.e., conveyed].
And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed [i.e., conveyed].
The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.
The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.
The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.

targetTranslation: do you then dispute with him? (about مَا يَرَىٰ - what he saw)
ayahEnglish: So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
And he certainly saw him in another descent

targetTranslation: a single descent (describing رَءَاهُ - he saw him)
ayahEnglish: And he certainly saw him in another descent
And he certainly saw him in another descent

targetTranslation: at/near (سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ - the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary)
ayahEnglish: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -

targetTranslation: of the lote tree (possessed by المنتهى)
ayahEnglish: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -

targetTranslation: near it/her (referring to جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ - Garden of Refuge)
ayahEnglish: Near it is the Garden of Refuge [i.e., Paradise] -
Near it is the Garden of Refuge [i.e., Paradise] -
When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].

targetTranslation: he covers/overwhelms (present tense, of ٱلسِّدْرَةَ - the lote tree)
ayahEnglish: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
The sight [of the Prophet (ﷺ)] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].

targetTranslation: he transgressed (describing what happened in مَا زَاغَ)
ayahEnglish: The sight [of the Prophet (ﷺ)] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].

targetTranslation: he saw (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ seeing signs of Allah)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.
So have you considered al-Lāt and al-ʿUzzā?

targetTranslation: The Lat (as the object being discussed)
ayahEnglish: So have you considered al-Lāt and al-ʿUzzā?
Is the male for you and for Him the female?

targetTranslation: that (feminine, far away) (pointing to قِسْمَةٌ - division)
ayahEnglish: That, then, is an unjust division.
That, then, is an unjust division.
That, then, is an unjust division.

targetTranslation: it (referring to the false idols/names mentioned after)
ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

targetTranslation: they follow closely/earnestly (referring to the disbelievers following false desires)
ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطٰنٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allāh has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.
Or is there for man whatever he wishes?
Or is there for man whatever he wishes?

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

targetTranslation: anything/something (object of تُغْنِى - does not avail)
ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

targetTranslation: he permits/allows (subject of يَشَآءُ - he wills)
ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allāh has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.

targetTranslation: those who (plural, referring to the disbelievers mentioned in لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,

ayahArabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

ayahArabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

targetTranslation: he makes sufficient (negated by لَا in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

targetTranslation: anything (that is being affected by يُغْنِى - does not benefit at all)
ayahArabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
ayahEnglish: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

ayahArabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
ayahEnglish: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

ayahArabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
ayahEnglish: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

targetTranslation: our remembrance (object of عَن/turning away from)
ayahArabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
ayahEnglish: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

targetTranslation: he wants/seeks (after لَمْ in this ayah)
ayahArabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
ayahEnglish: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

targetTranslation: your Lord (the one being referred to by إِنَّ)
ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.
distractors: and the one who is sought

ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
ayahEnglish: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

targetTranslation: those who (subject of يَجْزِىَ - will reward)
ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

targetTranslation: they did/performed (referring to those who did evil in أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟)
ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

ayahArabic: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
ayahEnglish: And to Allāh belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهٰتِكُمْ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

targetTranslation: they keep themselves away/avoid (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهٰتِكُمْ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

targetTranslation: major sins (object of يَجْتَنِبُونَ - they avoid)

ayahEnglish: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهٰتِكُمْ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
ayahEnglish: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

targetTranslation: have you then seen? (connected to ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ - the one who turned away)
ayahEnglish: Have you seen the one who turned away

targetTranslation: the one who/which (refers back to the one who turned away)
ayahEnglish: Have you seen the one who turned away
Have you seen the one who turned away
And gave a little and [then] refrained?

targetTranslation: is there with him? (connected to يَرَىٰٓ)
ayahEnglish: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?
Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?
Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
ayahEnglish: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses
And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -
And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -
That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another

targetTranslation: a female bearer (of وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ - another's burden)
ayahEnglish: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another
That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives
And that his effort is going to be seen -

targetTranslation: is seen (something that سَعْيَهُۥ/his striving will be)
ayahEnglish: And that his effort is going to be seen -

targetTranslation: he is repaid with it (object of الْجَزَآءَ)
ayahEnglish: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense -
And that to your Lord is the finality

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahEnglish: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
And that it is He who causes death and gives life

targetTranslation: he caused to die (connected to هُوَ in وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ)
ayahEnglish: And that it is He who causes death and gives life
And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -

targetTranslation: from a single drop of fluid (emphasized) (after مِن)
ayahEnglish: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted

targetTranslation: when (specifically for future events, used with تُمْنَىٰ)
ayahEnglish: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted

targetTranslation: it is emitted (describing نُّطْفَةٍ - a drop)
ayahEnglish: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
And that it is He who enriches and suffices
And that it is He who enriches and suffices
And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius.
And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius.
And that He destroyed the first [people of] ʿAad.
And that He destroyed the first [people of] ʿAad.
And Thamūd - and He did not spare [them] -

ayahArabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing.

ayahArabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
ayahEnglish: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing.

ayahEnglish: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing.

targetTranslation: He made (it) fall (referring to Allah destroying cities)
ayahEnglish: And the overturned towns He hurled down.
And covered them by that which He covered.
And covered them by that which He covered.
Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?

targetTranslation: a warner (one of many warners mentioned in هٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ)
ayahEnglish: This [Prophet (ﷺ)] is a warner from [i.e., like] the former warners.
The Approaching Day has approached.

ayahArabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Of it, [from those] besides Allāh, there is no remover.

targetTranslation: besides/other than (connected to مِن before it)
ayahArabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Of it, [from those] besides Allāh, there is no remover.

ayahArabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Of it, [from those] besides Allāh, there is no remover.

targetTranslation: any female/thing that removes covers (subject of ليس)

ayahEnglish: Of it, [from those] besides Allāh, there is no remover.

targetTranslation: Then is it from (هٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ - this discourse)
ayahEnglish: Then at this statement do you wonder?
Then at this statement do you wonder?
And you laugh and do not weep

targetTranslation: those (men) who are distracted/playful (while وَأَنتُمْ/and you all)
ayahEnglish: While you are proudly sporting?
